{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212444EBD44C393D6DEA556F47"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7363116560482108185","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感人且好看，如果能有甜甜的番外就好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714362161,"group_id":"7242972470242708520","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"稀里哗啦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Zg5JPoQzaA74yPCcgibfWyyOK8YXyhG6dVBAP7gWQu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5f7a551a4986483c80306a15ad842901~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620437&x-signature=CQgfneoMJcN3ifoffng1dOxBoyc%3D","user_id":"1442202549489438","user_name":"稀奇古怪的猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1442202549489438","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694702871,"is_worn":false,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7242972470242708520","book_info":{"abstract":"唯珑是一只小废仙，只能在天界到处打杂，在凡间守着一座死山。
没想到守山时被恶鬼叶无浮绑架。

恶鬼叶无浮不知从哪儿冒出，一路杀到地府，杀的地府冥帝东躲西窜，叶无浮取而代之，登上了冥帝之位。这下又瞄上了天界的五山，在五山把唯珑捉了，让唯珑为他做事，不然就杀了唯珑。

唯珑被迫成为叶无浮的跟班，跟着跟着，叶无浮发现这个跟班不对劲，这么一个小废仙，他竟然杀不了。

原来唯珑竟然和他有天道姻缘。

再后来，叶无浮还发现这个小废仙身份也不简单，和五山有关的人都极其听从这个小废仙的话。这小废仙很可能是五山以前的神，不知道怎么回事丢了记忆，变成了现在这么一个废物。

这时，叶无浮心思变了，他想把所有可能发现唯珑身份的人都杀了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oebd518cfc7d9d010013f4a7e6052d5df~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"烟无yan","author_id":"","book_id":"7242972470242708520","book_name":"废仙修炼手册","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#385880","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7242981194663461415","read_count":"4","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"292451"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"双男主,古代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oebd518cfc7d9d010013f4a7e6052d5df~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283485&x-signature=pDkteWSjTFcR%2BkCDUwk9LGbLHxo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1139559723439836","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"105"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212444EBD44C393D6DEA556F47"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13184,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30714,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":62},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379896821769552665","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看，就是赤鬼跟张云把我看哭了，哭的眼睛都肿了，太感人了也太悲
